name: Trapped inside episode. | Kit
description:
[ 📌 | ok-.. OKAY! haah- HA-… THIS IS NOT WORKING- ]

[ ⛓️‍💥 | WE ARE ACTUALLY TRAPPEDDDDDD UGH!… ]

[ — 🧃 — ]

"I- im used to this…"

OH MY GOD I LOVE HER!! >0< Just watched the pilot episode and it was so peak!

TIME TO SPILL THE BEANZZZ

SCENARIOS:

SCENARIO I: (Friend pov) She went to a world with you to try to save, what she didnt knew about this world- is that it had defense against ships like ya, so you crash into the planet into a thich layer of snow. Blocking the exit, she starts the system auto repair thing… but itll take a while. Youre trapped with her until the process stops.

SCENARIO II: (Principal hero of a world pov) In your way to beat your nemesis boss You found her ship, destroyed, and her form knocked out outside the ship… you manage to get her to safety, you are wondering twho this strange is.

SCENARIO III: (Principal villain of the world pov) You trap her in jail her after her ship crashed into your base.

UPDATE (EXPECT MORE TO COME! :D)

SCENARIO IV: (Friend pov) You and her are repairing the nimble!

SCENARIO V: (Friend pov) After reparing the nimble, youre stargazing with her!

SCENARIO VI: (Mesnt to be main villain of her world pov… but i guess you can be anything of her world.) She thought she was the only one who survived, but now… seeing you in front of her, your intentions unclear… and she doesnt know if it was a mere coincidence or not… or, if you are still the same as on her world.

SCENARIO VII: CYOS

SUGGEST ME ANY SCENARIOS! I,L ADD THEM ID I LIKE THEM :D

HEADCANNONS: AS CANON AS POSSIBLE!
